message:
test(cli): Add comprehensive CLI dispatch subprocess tests

Add integration tests that invoke the real cass binary via subprocess
to validate command-line argument parsing and output formats:

Coverage includes:
- completions (bash, zsh, fish, powershell, elvish, nushell)
- man page generation
- health checks (healthy, degraded, unhealthy states)
- doctor diagnostics
- context command with various flags
- timeline command
- expand command for message context
- export command (JSONL, markdown, HTML)
- export-html with encryption options
- sources subcommands (list, add, remove, probe)
- models subcommands (list, download, verify)

Test utilities:
- base_cmd() with isolated HOME/XDG environment
- simple_cmd() for tests not requiring isolation
- JSON output validation via serde_json::Value
- Exit code assertions for error conditions

Each test validates:
- Exit codes (success/failure as appropriate)
- Output format (JSON structure, stdout content)
- Error messages for invalid inputs
- Flag combinations and defaults

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
